description: ol-not-a-place (issue #407/F7): `[1 2][1] = 5` targets a postfix read over a list-literal base — not a `:var`-rooted place — so the checker flags it as a value, not a place, rendering the FULL target surface text `[1 2][1]` via the new `PostfixExpression` case in `checker-not-a-place.ts`'s renderer.
